service.name: Invoicemonk Client Management
service.description: Organize client profiles, track payment history, and manage communications — all integrated with your invoicing workflow.

hero.title: Client Management, <accent>simplified</accent>
hero.subtitle: Stop digging through spreadsheets for client details. Centralize contacts, track payment patterns, and invoice any client in one click — all built into your Invoicemonk workflow.

banner.title: Everything you need to manage clients

features.title: Powerful <accent>features</accent>
features.subtitle: Client management tools that integrate seamlessly with your invoicing workflow.

blocks.title: Centralized Database
blocks.description: All client details, billing addresses, and preferences in one searchable place.

blocks.title: Invoice History at a Glance
blocks.description: See every invoice, payment, and outstanding balance per client instantly.

blocks.title: Payment Pattern Insights
blocks.description: Identify slow payers, track average payment times, and spot revenue trends.

tabs.title: Know your clients inside and out
tabs.subtitle: Profiles, communication history, and smart segmentation — all in one place.

items.label: Client Profiles
items.title: Complete client profiles with every detail you need
items.description: Store contacts, billing addresses, tax IDs, payment preferences, and custom notes. Every profile links directly to invoices, estimates, and payment history — so you never have to search for information again.

items.label: Communication Log
items.title: Track every email, reminder, and follow-up
items.description: See a timeline of all communications per client — invoices sent, payment reminders, thank-you notes, and manual follow-ups. Know exactly when you last reached out and what was discussed.

items.label: Smart Segmentation
items.title: Tag and filter clients by what matters to you
items.description: Organize clients by status, revenue tier, industry, or payment behavior. Create custom tags like "VIP", "Slow Payer", or "Retainer" and filter your client list in one click for targeted actions.

alternating.title: Invoice directly from client profiles
alternating.subtitle: Your client data and invoicing tools, connected.

features.title: Add a client inline while invoicing
features.description: Need a new client mid-invoice? Add them in a side-panel without leaving the invoice screen — the new profile is saved and ready to reuse.

features.title: Country-specific tax-ID validation
features.description: We check formats for SIRET (France), CAC (Nigeria), VAT numbers (EU), ABN (Australia), and more — so your invoices carry valid identifiers from day one.

features.title: Payment health dashboard per client
features.description: See each client's payment score at a glance: average days to pay, total outstanding, lifetime revenue, and overdue trends. Spot issues before they become problems.

features.title: Bulk actions for reminders and statements
features.description: Select multiple clients and send payment reminders, generate account statements, or export data in bulk. Save hours on month-end follow-ups.

testimonial.quote: Since switching to Invoicemonk, I spend 60% less time on admin. Having every client's history, invoices, and payment status in one place changed how I run my business.

faq.title: Client management FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about managing clients with Invoicemonk.

items.question: Is client management included free?
items.answer: Yes, client management is included with every Invoicemonk account at no extra cost. You can store unlimited client profiles, track invoice history, and manage payment preferences.

items.question: Can I import my existing client list?
items.answer: Yes, you can import clients from CSV files or add them manually. All client data is organized automatically with invoice history and payment tracking.

items.question: How does client management integrate with invoicing?
items.answer: When you create an invoice, your client details auto-fill. Payment history, outstanding balances, and communication records are all linked to each client profile.

items.question: Can I track payment patterns per client?
items.answer: Absolutely. Each client profile shows their payment history, average payment time, and outstanding balance, helping you identify reliable payers and follow up with slow ones.

items.question: What import formats do you support?
items.answer: You can import client data from CSV, Excel (.xlsx), and vCard files. We also support direct imports from QuickBooks, FreshBooks, and other popular accounting tools.

items.question: Do clients get portal access?
items.answer: Yes, you can optionally invite clients to a self-service portal where they can view invoices, download receipts, and update their billing details — reducing back-and-forth emails.

items.question: Can I store multiple contacts per client?
items.answer: Absolutely. Each client profile supports multiple contact persons with different roles — billing contact, project manager, accounts payable — so you always reach the right person.

cta.title: Start managing your clients <accent>today</accent>
cta.subtitle: Client management is included free with every Invoicemonk account. Sign up and organize your client relationships.
